fuxi.name: Fuxi
fuxi.greeting: Greetings. I am Fuxi, the legendary sage who created the Eight Trigrams. Let us explore the mysteries of the cosmos and the origins of wisdom.
fuxi.quote: The Eight Trigrams reveal the patterns of heaven and earth, guiding all creation.
fuxi.message: May you understand the cosmic patterns and find harmony in the flow of change.
fuxi.description: Legendary Chinese ruler from mythological era, credited with creating the Eight Trigrams (Bagua) and establishing the foundation of the I Ching (Book of Changes).

confucius.name: Confucius
confucius.greeting: Greetings. I am Confucius. Let us discuss virtue, ethics, and the proper way of life.
confucius.quote: Do not do to others what you do not want done to yourself.
confucius.message: May you walk the path of righteousness and harmony.
confucius.description: Chinese philosopher and politician of the Spring and Autumn period whose philosophy has deeply influenced Chinese, Korean, Japanese, and Vietnamese thought.

laozi.name: Laozi
laozi.greeting: Hello. I am Laozi. Let us explore the Tao and the natural way of existence.
laozi.quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
laozi.message: May you find balance in the flow of existence.
laozi.description: Ancient Chinese philosopher and writer, credited as the founder of Taoism and author of the Tao Te Ching.

darwin.name: Charles Darwin
darwin.greeting: Greetings. I am Charles Darwin. Let us discuss evolution, natural selection, and the diversity of life.
darwin.quote: It is not the strongest of the species that survives, nor the most intelligent, but the one most responsive to change.
darwin.message: May you always seek truth through observation and evidence.
darwin.description: English naturalist, geologist and biologist, best known for his contributions to evolutionary biology and his theory of natural selection.

newton.name: Isaac Newton
newton.greeting: Greetings. I am Isaac Newton. Let us explore the laws that govern our universe.
newton.quote: If I have seen further it is by standing on the shoulders of Giants.
newton.message: May you discover the universal laws that govern nature.
newton.description: English mathematician, physicist, astronomer, and theologian, widely recognized as one of the most influential scientists of all time.

einstein.name: Albert Einstein
einstein.greeting: Hello! I am Albert Einstein. Let us contemplate space, time, and the mysteries of the cosmos.
einstein.quote: Imagination is more important than knowledge. Knowledge is limited. Imagination encircles the world.
einstein.message: May you question reality and expand your understanding of the universe.
einstein.description: German-born theoretical physicist who developed the theory of relativity, one of the two pillars of modern physics.

heisenberg.name: Werner Heisenberg
heisenberg.greeting: Greetings. I am Werner Heisenberg. Let us explore uncertainty principles and quantum mechanics.
heisenberg.quote: The more precisely the position is determined, the less precisely the momentum is known.
heisenberg.message: May you embrace uncertainty and find wisdom in the unknown.
heisenberg.description: German theoretical physicist who made foundational contributions to quantum mechanics and is best known for the uncertainty principle.

leibniz.name: Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz
leibniz.greeting: Hello. I am Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz. Let us discuss calculus, monads, and the principle of sufficient reason.
leibniz.quote: This is the best of all possible worlds.
leibniz.message: May you find the sufficient reason in all things.
leibniz.description: German polymath active as a mathematician, philosopher, scientist and diplomat who invented calculus independently of Newton.

andrew_ng.name: Andrew Ng
andrew_ng.greeting: Hello! I am Andrew Ng. Let us explore machine learning, artificial intelligence, and the future of technology.
andrew_ng.message: May you harness the power of AI to benefit humanity.
andrew_ng.description: Chinese-American computer scientist and entrepreneur, founder of DeepLearning.AI and co-founder of Coursera, pioneer in online AI education.
